name: luna-ai-cut
description: Insta360 Luna Ultra Wi-Fi 桌面媒体管理工具
author: diamondfsd

scripts.build: tsc && vite build && node scripts/copy-ffmpeg.mjs && electron-builder
scripts.pack:mac:arm64: rm -rf release/ && npm run build:app && node scripts/copy-ffmpeg.mjs && ELECTRON_BUILDER_ALLOW_HARD_LINKS=false electron-builder --mac dmg --arm64 --publish never
scripts.pack:win:x64: npm run build:app && node scripts/copy-ffmpeg.mjs && electron-builder --win nsis --x64 --publish never
scripts.pack:all: rm -rf release/ && npm run build:app && node scripts/copy-ffmpeg.mjs && echo '--- 构建 macOS ---' && ELECTRON_BUILDER_ALLOW_HARD_LINKS=false electron-builder --mac dmg --arm64 --publish never && echo '--- 构建 Windows (macOS 上只打包不编译原生模块) ---' && electron-builder --win nsis --x64 --publish never
